visualDirection.style: Premium Korean watercolor, gouache, and soft ink picture-book style with hanji texture.
visualDirection.safety: Characters must be expressive, gentle, and child-safe. Tigers are mischievous or majestic but never horror-like.

characters.description: Korean mother in simple cream and sage hanbok work clothes, calm eyes, practical warmth, protective posture.
Korean child age 8, brave and thoughtful, cream jeogori with indigo pants, protective of younger sibling.
Korean child age 5, curious and expressive, soft pink jacket, round cheeks, trusts the older sibling.

Large Korean folktale tiger who is a deceptive antagonist: cunning, hungry, watchful, and dangerous through eyes, posture, shadow, and framing, while remaining child-safe and never graphic or horror-like.
characters.voice: Falsely gentle, low, calculating, then frustrated.

characters.description: Humble Korean woodcutter in patched but clean work hanbok, kind eyes, careful hands, modest posture.
Gentle mountain stream spirit with flowing jade and ivory robes, mist-soft edges, elder warmth, no intimidating deity imagery.
Comic Korean neighbor with eager eyebrows, not villainous, learns through embarrassment and repair.
Boastful but harmless Korean folktale tiger, oversized reactions, rounded paws, expressive ears, soft ink stripes.
characters.voice: Proud whisper that becomes nervous comedy.

characters.description: Korean mother in a cozy cottage, patient with baby, soft blue-gray hanbok, gentle hands.
Korean baby wrapped in a small quilt, expressive face, stops crying for dried persimmon.
Friendly night traveler with simple pack and brimmed hat, relaxed and good-humored.
Kind younger brother in plain warm-toned hanbok, generous eyes, gentle shoulders, moves with care.
Older brother in tidy but stiff clothing, expressive eyebrows, comic greed, capable of real apology.
Small swallow with glossy blue-black feathers and white belly, bright eyes, graceful wing shapes.
characters.voice: Chirps only; gratitude shown through motion.

characters.description: Korean mountain grandmother with silver hair in a bun, quilted vest over simple hanbok, clever smile, warm hands.
Boastful hungry tiger with round belly and expressive paws, child-safe, learns manners through slapstick.
Friendly magical egg, turtle, straw mat, wooden mallet, and rice sack with tiny expressive faces and gentle movement.
characters.voice: Small chorus of brave household voices.
